events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Still strutting and captivating audiences worldwide, Mick Jagger celebrates another year. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV launched with that iconic first video. We're still here though, aren't we?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Iconic Debut Album
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album changed everything for British music. What's your top track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place from August 15-18, 1969, defining a generation.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock. A moment in history that still resonates.

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we pay tribute to Elvis Presley. His music lives on forever.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Remembering the unparalleled guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: The world lost a true musical pioneer when Jimi Hendrix passed. His influence on guitarists remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Crossing That Road
angles.copy: The album cover is as famous as the music itself. 'Abbey Road' from The Beatles – still a masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude remain as iconic as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable voice of Oasis and a formidable solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Our kid Liam Gallagher is 54 today! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless solo album 'Imagine' in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song whose message of peace is still profoundly relevant.

events.title: First iPod Released
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, it changed how we listened to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (or a cuppa) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond and why?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring musical genius and powerful messages of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered the eclectic masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A truly diverse collection.
